vibe: Elite Web3 Casino, High-Energy, Neon Noir
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Blend high-end luxury dark themes with Web3 neon crypto accents.
Mobile-First: Telegram Mini App layout, bottom navigation, thumb-friendly tap targets.
Contrast & Glow: Deep black backgrounds combined with vibrant glowing accents (Laser Green, Cyber Yellow).
Texture over Flatness: Use abstract dark textures and noise behind game cards rather than flat gray.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background text-white pb-24
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-surface_glass border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

game_card.style: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-white/5 transition-transform duration-300 active:scale-95
game_card.internal_layout: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 aspect-square text-center gap-3
game_card.image_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent z-10

bottom_nav.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 flex justify-around items-center h-20 bg-[#050507]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 pb-safe
bottom_nav.icon_style: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-text_secondary hover:text-white transition-colors

button_primary.style: w-full py-4 rounded-xl bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,102,0.3)]

button_secondary.style: w-full py-4 rounded-xl bg-white/10 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors backdrop-blur-md

balance_pill.style: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md

images.description: Telegram blue background texture for Stars/TON top-up banners
Dark playing cards macro for Blackjack game card
Roulette numbers close up for Roulette game card
Abstract blue glowing lines for Crash and Bomber game cards

media.icons_strategy: Use lucide-react with high stroke-width (2.5) and add drop shadows to simulate neon glows. For example: filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px currentColor).

animations.number_ticker: Use framer-motion for counting up balances

interactive_elements.data_testid_strategy: ALL interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='topup-ton-button', data-testid='game-blackjack-card', data-testid='nav-profile').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Telegram Mini App layout: constrain max-width to mobile size (max-w-md mx-auto) with a fixed bottom navigation bar.
Implement 6 specific games in the lobby: Blackjack, Roulette, Bomber, Crash, Dice, Slots.
For game cards, use the provided media background URLs with heavy dark overlays (bg-black/70) and prominent lucide-react icons in the center (e.g., Rocket for Crash, Bomb for Bomber, Dices for Dice).
Build a 'Top-Up / Deposit' modal using Shadcn Drawer or Dialog. Include options for TON (using #0098EA) and Telegram Stars (using #FFCC00).
Implement a language switcher (RU/EN) in the Profile section.
Use Azeret Mono for all headings and balance numbers, and Manrope for UI text.
Ensure the UI feels like a high-end web3 crypto game: use neon glowing effects via CSS drop-shadows on icons and primary balances, avoiding flat solid colors where possible.
Use Framer Motion for page transitions and balance number ticker animations.
